session_accepted_message: Your application for the campaign "{campaignName}" has been accepted.
session_rejected_message: Your application for the campaign "{campaignName}" was not accepted.
purchase_submitted_message: {testerName} has submitted their proof of purchase for the campaign "{campaignName}".
test_submitted_message: {testerName} has submitted their test for the campaign "{campaignName}".
test_validated_message: Your test for the campaign "{campaignName}" has been validated. Your reward has been credited.
session_cancelled_message: The session for the campaign "{campaignName}" has been cancelled.
dispute_created_message: A dispute has been opened for the campaign "{campaignName}".
message_received_message: You have received a new message from {senderName}.
payment_received_message: You have received a payment of {amount}.
tip_received_message: You have received a tip of {amount} from {senderName}.
